title: dianthus superbus subsp. autumnalis
intro: Dianthus superbus subsp. autumnalis, also known as the autumnal chrysanthemum or autumnal pink, is a subspecies of the Dianthus superbus plant, a type of flowering plant in the carnation family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Dianthus superbus subsp. autumnalis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a useful remedy for treating various ailments. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
